author: dttdrv
name: SP4096 + Linear LR Decay + Depth Recurrence + MuonEq-R
blurb: 11L SP4096 MLP-4x with linear warmdown to LR=0 (replacing cosine-to-0.05), depth recurrence on layers 4,5, parallel residuals from layer 7, QK-Gain 5.0, all-int6 GPTQ, Brotli-10. The LR schedule fix reduces the quantization gap by 61% (0.038 to 0.015 BPB) and pruning by 77%. 3-seed mean: 1.09244346 BPB. Welch t=-68.85 vs PR #1019.
quantization: Full Hessian GPTQ int6 per-row, 64 calibration batches
technique_summary: SP4096 + Linear LR to zero + Depth Recurrence L4,5 + Parallel Residuals L7 + MuonEq-R + QK-Gain 5.0
